creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
LibreSSL 2.7.0 was released on 21 March in security/libressl-devel and introduced support for many OpenSSL 1.0.2 and 1.1 APIs. However, this has broken building of this port when DEFAULT_VERSIONS contains ssl=libressl-devel.

Upstream is actively working on a fix. This PR serves to coordinate downstream patching efforts before upstream releases their fix.
